title: Persistence Mechanism Established
description: Detects persistence mechanisms including cron job creation, systemd service installation and SSH authorized_keys modification.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%/etc/cron%' OR payload ILIKE '%authorized_keys%' OR payload ILIKE '%/etc/systemd/system%' OR payload ILIKE '%/etc/rc.local%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
